title: Junior Business Development Manager at NCC Urban

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at NCC Urban
jsonLd.description:
NCC Urban has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About NCC Urban:
NCC Urban is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NCC Urban!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
